data.content: Plan review sent back for revision. Root cause analysis is mostly correct: checkPromptGuidance compares raw file profile IDs without normalization, and prompt-guidance fixes are append-only. The blocking issue is the proposed PROMPT_KNOTS change: runDoctorFix currently ignores expectedProfile and reads PROMPT_KNOTS.md or PROMPT_BEATS.md verbatim, so hardcoding autopilot would still mis-fix semiauto repos. Revise the plan to make prompt guidance generation profile-aware, either by exporting and reusing canonical normalization plus injecting the expected profile at fix time, or by adding real profile-specific templates. Also account for the fact that normalizeProfileId in src/lib/workflows.ts is not exported today.
